Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class Agreement

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.Agreement
public class Agreement extends Object
Agreement

A legal Agreement for an Account.

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    Agreement.Builder
     

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Agreement()
     
    Agreement(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> affirmationTime, Optional<String> agreementId, Optional<String> agreementName, Optional<? extends AgreementSource> agreementSource, Optional<? extends AgreementState> agreementState, Optional<String> agreementUri, Optional<String> agreementVersion, Optional<String> enrollmentId, Optional<String> legalEntityId, Optional<String> legalNaturalPersonId, Optional<String> name)
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime>
    affirmationTime()
    The time recorded relating to when a given agreement is `AFFIRMED` by the Customer; This is set to the time when the affirmation is processed by AFS
    Optional<String>
    agreementId()
    An Apex-generated identifier used to reference a single legal agreement associated with the account
    Optional<String>
    agreementName()
    The friendly name of the agreement; Typically mirrors the enrollment it is attached to (e.g., `LENDING_FULLY_PAID_STOCK_LOAN`)
    Optional<AgreementSource>
    agreementSource()
    An internal indicator from where the agreement was generated; Typically `ACCOUNTS_SERVICE` if accessing our public APIs
    Optional<AgreementState>
    agreementState()
    The status of an agreement which blocks an enrollment; `REQUIRED` if not yet received, or `AFFIRMED` if acknowledgement has been received by AFS
    Optional<String>
    agreementUri()
    A URI referencing a static PDF containing the legalese of a given agreement; All agreements of the same nature link to the same publicly-available PDF.
    Optional<String>
    agreementVersion()
    An internal version number based on typographical revisions of the related agreement; Version numbers are automatically updated when new agreements are available and should be of no technical concern to the integrator
    static Agreement.Builder
    builder()
     
    Optional<String>
    enrollmentId()
    A system-generated unique identifier referencing a single instance of an enrollment; Used to access the record after creation
    boolean
    equals(Object o)
     
    int
    hashCode()
     
    Optional<String>
    legalEntityId()
    References a single entity
    Optional<String>
    legalNaturalPersonId()
    References a single natural person
    Optional<String>
    name()
    The name field Format: accounts/{account}/agreements/{agreement}
    String
    toString()

    An internal version number based on typographical revisions of the related agreement; Version numbers are automatically updated when new agreements are available and should be of no technical concern to the integrator

    • Agreement

      public Agreement(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> affirmationTime, Optional<String> agreementId, Optional<String> agreementName, Optional<? extends AgreementSource> agreementSource, Optional<? extends AgreementState> agreementState, Optional<String> agreementUri, Optional<String> agreementVersion, Optional<String> enrollmentId, Optional<String> legalEntityId, Optional<String> legalNaturalPersonId, Optional<String> name)

  • Method Details

    • affirmationTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> affirmationTime()
      The time recorded relating to when a given agreement is `AFFIRMED` by the Customer; This is set to the time when the affirmation is processed by AFS

    • agreementId

      public Optional<String> agreementId()
      An Apex-generated identifier used to reference a single legal agreement associated with the account

    • agreementName

      public Optional<String> agreementName()
      The friendly name of the agreement; Typically mirrors the enrollment it is attached to (e.g., `LENDING_FULLY_PAID_STOCK_LOAN`)

    • agreementSource

      public Optional<AgreementSource> agreementSource()
      An internal indicator from where the agreement was generated; Typically `ACCOUNTS_SERVICE` if accessing our public APIs

    • agreementState

      public Optional<AgreementState> agreementState()
      The status of an agreement which blocks an enrollment; `REQUIRED` if not yet received, or `AFFIRMED` if acknowledgement has been received by AFS

    • agreementUri

      public Optional<String> agreementUri()
      A URI referencing a static PDF containing the legalese of a given agreement; All agreements of the same nature link to the same publicly-available PDF.

    • agreementVersion

      public Optional<String> agreementVersion()
      An internal version number based on typographical revisions of the related agreement; Version numbers are automatically updated when new agreements are available and should be of no technical concern to the integrator

    • enrollmentId

      public Optional<String> enrollmentId()
      A system-generated unique identifier referencing a single instance of an enrollment; Used to access the record after creation

    • legalEntityId

      public Optional<String> legalEntityId()
      References a single entity

    • legalNaturalPersonId

      public Optional<String> legalNaturalPersonId()
      References a single natural person

    • name

      public Optional<String> name()
      The name field Format: accounts/{account}/agreements/{agreement}
